description: Registry that tells Atlas which folders to surface and how. See atlas_registry_schema.md for the schema, atlas_spec.md for philosophy, atlas_classification.md for categories, atlas_v1_plan.md for v1 scope.

entries.title: Archive
entries.summary: Old texts, edited with care so they can be read.
entries.notes: v1 flagship world. Source folder is named 'Digital Archive'; public world name is 'Archive'. Finish in-flight migration.

entries.title: Language
entries.summary: Scripts, sounds, and the shape of language.
entries.notes: v1 flagship world. Opening view sourced from projects/language/Languages — verify scope per atlas_v1_plan §7 Q1.

entries.title: Gods
entries.summary: Pantheons across cultures, set beside one another.
entries.notes: v1 flagship world. Already live at workspace-hub/gods/. Polish to Atlas visual standard in v1.

entries.title: Arabic
entries.summary: A close reading of Arabic — its script, sound, and grammar.
entries.notes: Promote to standalone world if it outgrows the Language world.

entries.title: IPA
entries.summary: The International Phonetic Alphabet, laid out to be read and heard.

entries.title: Digital Symbols
entries.summary: Notes on the symbols we still use, and the ones we have not yet named.
entries.notes: Scope pending per atlas_v1_plan §7 Q2 — subworld or resource. Status stays 'draft' until confirmed.
